description_long: This is a patchwork stuffed toy resembling a bear, crafted from various fabric pieces stitched together with visible white thread. The bear features a round head with two upright ears, shiny button-like eyes, a small pink nose, and a subtle stitched mouth. Its body is adorned with a red bow tie and a large plaid patch on the belly, while the arms and legs display different colored fabric patches, including green, brown, and orange. The back of the toy shows more patchwork, with a prominent green tartan patch on the lower back and additional stitched seams. The surface appears soft and slightly worn, giving it a handmade, vintage look. This toy would likely be found in urban parks, playgrounds, or on sidewalks as a lost or discarded item.
description: A patchwork stuffed bear with button eyes, a red bow tie, and various colored fabric patches stitched together. The toy has a soft, handmade appearance with visible seams and a plaid patch on its belly.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, button eyes, pink nose, red bow tie, and plaid belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, ear, and the patchwork on the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and a large green tartan patch on the lower back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the bear's profile, pink patch on the arm, and additional patchwork on the leg.
attribute_facial_expression: The bear has a neutral facial expression with shiny button eyes and a small, slightly upturned stitched mouth. The features give it a gentle, calm appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
